name: mythosforge-brandkit
description: Extract or author a reusable brand/style token (brandkit.json) that every generator + lookgate share for one consistent visual identity. Extract mode uses Google Gemini vision (GEMINI_API_KEY); author mode needs no key. No wallet, no payment.
invoke: node brandkit.mjs (--from <img|url> | --author [--in partial.json]) [--name x] [--out brandkit.json] [--model m] [--base-url url] [--auth bearer|x-api-key] [--dry-run] [--schema]

env.note: extract mode (--from) needs GEMINI_API_KEY (default Google Gemini vision; BRANDKIT_API_KEY accepted alias; BRANDKIT_BASE_URL/BRANDKIT_MODEL retarget any OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint). author mode (--author) needs no key.

from.note: extract mode: path or URL to a reference image

author.note: author mode: validate/fill a hand-written token (no key)

in.note: author mode: optional partial token JSON to fill from

output: Style token JSON on stdout + written to --out (see references/brandkit-schema.md): { name, north_star, palette, typography, feel_words, anti_feel, lighting, emblem_refs, prompt_suffix }. Wrapper prints { ok, mode, name, path, token }.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
